---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for GitVerse
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the pain point. GitVerse only adds features that
directly solve a real problem for multi-account git users — see
[BRIEF.md](../../BRIEF.md) for scope.

> Note: cloud sync, AI features, PR/issue management, login/OAuth, telemetry,
> and notifications are permanently out of scope and will be closed.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches or workarounds you've tried (e.g. doing it manually in the
terminal).

## Additional context

Mockups, examples from other tools, or anything else that helps.
